name: AP Atlas Seed
description: The first relationship map for Asymmetric Precision v2.

nodes.label: Asymmetric Precision
nodes.summary: The public home of Applied Systems Thinking.

nodes.label: See the System
nodes.summary: Understand the whole before optimizing the parts.

nodes.label: Build Better Mental Models
nodes.summary: Complex problems require better ways of thinking, not just more information.

nodes.label: Evidence Over Assumption
nodes.summary: Good decisions come from understanding reality as it is.

nodes.label: Design for Outcomes
nodes.summary: Activities matter only insofar as they create meaningful outcomes.

nodes.label: Practical Over Theoretical
nodes.summary: Frameworks should improve real organizations, not just explain them.

nodes.label: Hidden Systems
nodes.summary: Invisible relationships, incentives, constraints, trust, authority, and feedback that shape outcomes.

nodes.label: Tactical Compassion
nodes.summary: Precision with humanity; compassion with discipline.

nodes.label: Essays
nodes.summary: Short, sharp explorations of AP ideas.

nodes.label: Frameworks
nodes.summary: Reusable mental models and decision structures.

nodes.label: Laboratories
nodes.summary: Practical implementations where AP ideas become tools, software, games, and experiments.

nodes.label: Field Notes
nodes.summary: Operational observations from systems under pressure.
